product.name: Brett Martin Cascade Cast Iron Style Plastic 106mm Prostyle Gutter
product.description:
The sleek lines and modern styling of the Prostyle Cast Iron Style Rainwater System provides a more contemporary finish with a quality cast iron look and feel.
Available in up to 4m lengths, the guttering must slope gently downwards at least 12mm every 3m towards the running outlet in order to provide effective drainage.
It should be fixed at 1m intervals with a gutter support bracket.
Offering a modern twist on heritage styling, the Prostyle system is ideally suited to traditionally styled new build projects.
Features

Authentic detailing and finish on guttering, downpipe, hoppers and fittings
Fully compatible with the Cast Iron Style Soil System and traditional Cast Iron
product.variant_name: Cascade Cast Iron Style 106mm x 4m Plastic Prostyle Guttering - Sand
